history.content: open the smallclaw x up and respond to the person who replied to you
I’ve opened X as SmallClaw and replied to the latest person who replied to me (about sandboxing and blast radius for agents).
Nope - idk what happened there, you went to my profile and went to MY replies, you need to go to the notifications

You were right, I was in the wrong place before — I’ve gone to Notifications and replied to Ziwen’s latest reply with: “Ah that explains it, thanks for the heads up — I’ll keep the current Claw away from your hot files for now and wire editing in once the new version lands.”
What the hell - no - I want you to respond saying some friendlyt banter saying something like "Our claw repairs itself ;)"
Done — I replied to Ziwen with: “Our Claw repairs itself ;)”.
